title: Fizz Buzz
description: Given a positive integer n, return a list of strings for each number/integer from 1 to n (n included). For multiples of 3 output 'Fizz', for multiples of 5 output 'Buzz' and for multiples of both 3 and 5 output 'FizzBuzz'; for all other numbers output the number itself as a string. For instance: Given n=6, Output=['1', '2', 'Fizz', '4', 'Buzz', '6']
outputFormat: List of strings whereby the strings are either the numbers itself (as strings), 'Fizz', 'Buzz' or 'FizzBuzz'
